sourceTitle: FOH Work Duties and During Service.xlsx

modules.title: FOH — Bar
modules.desc: Bar (counter & help floor) duties and during-service responsibilities.

steps.heading: Work Duties
items: Freezer and bench has to be tidy and clean
Wash all dirty dishes (scrub with SPONGE AND SOAP and put through dishwasher)
Polish and put away clean dishes
Empty bin and milk crates whenever needed full
Refill take-away cups, straws, lids and coffee beans
Refill pastry bags and coffee bean retail bags
Refill freezer (ice cream, fruit and clean ice)
Change over ice cream scoop water

steps.heading: During Service
items: Greet all customers walking through the door and ask dine in or take-away
Pay attention to customers at the counter and serve before you continue with other tasks
Make cold drinks
Help barista with coffee shots
Wash dishes
Run food if floor person is busy
Take orders on counter and floor
Answer the phone whenever you can
Seat customers at appropriate tables and let floor person know
Bag up customer's pastries before serving the next one
Send pastries to kitchen and and notify chef
Organise dockets by stacking them neatly or leave in the printer when busy
Always get a name with the order and write "with food" if appropriate
Notify customer of wait-time while busy
Ask customer how their experience was when they come up to pay
Say "thank you" to customers leaving the store
Have a good attitude while serving customers (smile, ask how they are, etc)
Communicate with your teammates (ask for help, tell them important information)
Always help floor person clean tables, seat people, take orders or run food if they are busy

modules.title: FOH — Floor
modules.desc: Floor service duties and during-service responsibilities.

steps.heading: Work Duties
items: Make sure shop presenation is good (clean and tidy)
Wipe and organise Frank Green shelf
Wipe and organise middle island cabinet
Clean and dry the menus

steps.heading: During Service
items: Sanitise water bottles while topping up
Eyes up and pay attention to customers when they need something
Make sure all tables have water, even if they ordered at the counter
Exchange empty water bottles with full ones if needed
Give appropriate cutlery after taking customer's order if you have time
ALWAYS repeat the order to customer and proofread before you send
Notify bar and kitchen staff if customer has a strict dietary requirement
Acknowledge customers - smile/make eye contact, don’t ignore when you walk past
Be aware of bookings and reserve appropriately
Top up napkins and salt and pepper and polish cutlery
Check flowers on every single table and throw away when they go brown

modules.title: FOH — Barista
modules.desc: Barista station duties and during-service responsibilities.

steps.heading: Work Duties
items: Bench and speedrack has to be clean and tidy
Wash all dirty dishes (scrub with SPONGE AND SOAP and put through dishwasher)
Polish and put away clean dishes
Empty bin and milk crates whenever needed full
Refill take-away cups, straws, lids and coffee beans
Refill pastry bags and coffee bean retail bags
Empty knock tube
Refill sugar, chocolate, chai powder and chai leaves
Refill and clean coffee syrup pumps
Change over thermometer water

steps.heading: During Service
items: Greet all customers walking through the door and ask dine in or take-away
Serve customers at counter if no one else available
Make coffee
Make cold drinks if no one available
Wash dishes
Run food if floor person is busy
Take take-away orders
Answer the phone whenever you can
Seat customers at appropriate tables and let floor person know
Bag up customer's pastries before serving the next one
Send pastries to kitchen and and notify chef
Organise dockets by stacking them neatly or leave in the printer when busy
Always get a name with the order and write "with food" if appropriate
Notify customer of wait-time while busy
Ask customer how their experience was when they come up to pay
Say "thank you" to customers leaving the store
Have a good attitude while serving customers (smile, ask how they are, etc)
Communicate with your teammates (ask for help, tell them important information)

modules.title: FOH — Night Bar
modules.desc: Night-time bar (cold drinks & counter service) duties.

steps.heading: Work Duties
items: Freezer and bench has to be tidy and clean
Wash all dirty dishes (scrub with SPONGE AND SOAP and put through dishwasher)
Polish and put away clean dishes
Empty bin and milk crates whenever needed full
Refill take-away cups, straws, lids and coffee beans
Refill pastry bags and coffee bean retail bags
Refill freezer (ice cream, fruit and clean ice)
Change over ice cream scoop water

steps.heading: During Service
items: Greet all customers walking through the door and ask dine in or take-away
Pay attention to customers at the counter and serve before you continue with other tasks
Make cold drinks
Make coffee
Wash dishes
Run food if floor person is busy
Take take-away orders
Answer the phone whenever you can
Seat customers at appropriate tables and let floor person know
Bag up customer's pastries before serving the next one
Send pastries to kitchen and and notify chef
Organise dockets by stacking them neatly or leave in the printer when busy
Always get a name with the order and write "with food" if appropriate
Notify customer of wait-time while busy
Ask customer how their experience was when they come up to pay
Say "thank you" to customers leaving the store
Have a good attitude while serving customers (smile, ask how they are, etc)
Communicate with your teammates (ask for help, tell them important information)
Always help floor person clean tables, seat people, take orders or run food if they are busy
Help with prep when not busy
Help with closing duties after 7pm

items: Make sure shop presenation is good (clean and tidy)
Wipe and organise Frank Green shelf
Wipe and organise middle island cabinet
Clean and dry the menus

Eyes up and pay attention to customers when they need something
